releaseStatus: Assessment results can now drive reteach plans, group recommendations, and Teach My Day next steps.

skillAreas.title: Phonics & Decoding
skillAreas.description: Sound-symbol knowledge, blending, word reading, and spelling patterns.

secure.action: Extension word work, morphology, and connected-text application.

developing.action: Guided blending, word mapping, dictation, and immediate correction.

reteach.action: Explicit UFLI intervention with phoneme-grapheme mapping and decodable practice.

skillAreas.title: Fluency
skillAreas.description: Accuracy, rate, phrasing, punctuation, and expression.

secure.action: Prosody, performance reading, and meaning-based expression.

developing.action: Modeled reading, echo reading, partner practice, and repeated reading.

reteach.action: Short repeated reading with immediate correction and phrase marking.

skillAreas.title: Vocabulary
skillAreas.description: Student-friendly meanings, oral use, context, and transfer to reading and writing.

secure.action: Use words in discussion, writing, comparison, and word relationships.

developing.action: Review words with examples, nonexamples, context, and partner talk.

reteach.action: Teach with pictures, gestures, oral rehearsal, and repeated exposure.

skillAreas.title: Reading Comprehension
skillAreas.description: Main idea, details, cause and effect, sequence, character response, and text evidence.

secure.action: Higher-order questions, text evidence, comparison, and written explanation.

developing.action: Guided rereading, graphic organizer, partner explanation, and evidence selection.

reteach.action: Use a shorter passage, explicit modeling, pictures, and oral retell before writing.

skillAreas.title: Grammar / GUM
skillAreas.description: Weekly grammar skill and application in sentences and writing.

secure.action: Apply the skill during revision and editing.

developing.action: Model, sort, practice, and apply in one supported sentence.

reteach.action: Use concrete examples, oral sentences, manipulatives, and immediate feedback.

skillAreas.title: Writing
skillAreas.description: Ideas, organization, sentence structure, conventions, and revision.

developing.action: Oral rehearsal, modeled sentence, graphic organizer, and guided drafting.

reteach.action: Use drawing, oral storytelling, dictation, and one-sentence success criteria.
